Employees in 3 cities, including Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle, set to strike on Friday due to failed negotiations on raises.
news.summary: Employees in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle are set to go on strike following unsuccessful negotiations between the company and the workers’ union regarding salary increases.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fell after House rejected Trump-backed bill, nears government shutdown. Market bounce fizzled.
news.summary: Stock market futures experienced a decline after the House dismissed a bill supported by Trump aiming to prevent a government shutdown. This occurred on Thursday following a brief rise in the market. The Dow Jones futures fell as a result, indicating potential economic challenges ahead.

news.headline: Keg Royalties Income Fund declares $0.0946 per unit cash distribution for January 2025, payable on Jan 31, 2025.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 19, 2024, The Keg Royalties Income Fund (TSX: KEG.UN) revealed that a distribution of $0.0946 per unit has been sanctioned for January 2025. This distribution will be granted to unitholders recorded as of December 31, 2024, and will be disbursed on January 31, 2025. The decision to set an earlier record date for this distribution compared to other months aligns with the Fund's year-end schedule.

news.headline: Report finds minimal progress in addressing China's housing crisis; situation remains dire despite efforts.
Walrus Pump (TPEX: 6982) enters Taiwan OTC market at NTD 51, attracting global demand for water pumps.
news.summary: Walrus Pump, a prominent pump brand trading under the ticker symbol TPEX: 6982, made its official debut on the Taiwan OTC market on the 18th. The underwriting price for its initial listing was set at NTD 51.

Shiba Inu partners with Chainlink to boost Shibarium. They integrate Chainlink's standard for blockchain interoperability to expand ecosystem tokens on 12 different blockchains. Lead Shytoshi Kusama calls it "huge news."
news.summary: Shiba Inu (SHIB) announced a partnership with Chainlink (LINK) to enhance its ecosystem. This collaboration will integrate Chainlink’s blockchain interoperability standard into Shibarium, Shiba Inu’s Layer-2 blockchain. The Cross-Chain Token standard will extend the availability of SHIB, LEASH, and BONE tokens from the Shiba Inu ecosystem to 12 different blockchains. Shytoshi Kusama, the mysterious leader of Shiba Inu, described the partnership as significant and hinted at more developments to come. Kusama emphasized the importance of this partnership for the ecosystem's growth.

news.headline: Macao focuses on tech innovation and talent development for diversified growth; Lei Zhen from Tsinghua University settled there in 2014.
news.summary: A graduate named Lei Zhen from Tsinghua University in Beijing made the decision in 2014 to establish his business in Zhuhai, located in the Macao Special Administrative Region. This choice marked his innovative application of entrepreneurship in south China's Guangdong Province.

news.headline: SEC greenlights Hashdex, Franklin ETFs on Bitcoin-Ether. NYSE Arca eyes Grayscale index ETF with no approval yet.
news.summary: NYSE Arca has shown interest in listing a Grayscale cryptocurrency index ETF that holds various spot cryptocurrencies. However, approval for this listing is still pending.

news.headline: FDA approved Humacyte's SYMVESS for extremity vascular trauma; a first bioengineered vessel-tyod.
news.summary: SYMVESS is an innovative bioengineered human tissue that serves as a versatile vascular conduit for arterial replacement and repair. This groundbreaking technology represents a significant advancement in the medical field, offering a first-of-its-kind solution for various cardiovascular procedures. The implantable tissue is designed to provide a sustainable and effective option for patients in need of vascular interventions. Its unique design and composition make it a promising alternative for traditional vascular grafts. Overall, SYMVESS has the potential to revolutionize vascular surgery and improve outcomes for patients worldwide.

Regional bank stocks outperform S&P 500 with SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF climbing 10% since 2024. Analysts predict more upside due to potential Trump administration, easing regulation. Renewed interest expected with improving loan growth, deposit growth, NIM expansion. Investors showing increased interest but not buying yet. Read full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Since the 2024 U.S. election, regional bank stocks have surged, with the SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (NYSE:KRE) rising by approximately 10%, outpacing the S&P 500's 5% increase. Analysts at JPMorgan, led by Anthony Elian, CFA, are optimistic about further growth potential. Factors contributing to this outlook include the potential pro-business stance of a Trump administration, regulatory easing, and favorable interest rates. Elian noted in a recent client communication that investors, who had been cautious due to regulatory issues and previous banking challenges, are now showing renewed interest in the sector. The optimism for regional banks stems from anticipated improvements in fundamentals such as loan growth, deposit expansion, and net interest margin (NIM) increase. Despite this positive sentiment, some investors are yet to make significant buy moves.

news.headline: Philippine central bank considers rate cut in first 2025 meeting, says governor.
news.summary: In the latest data released, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a new low of 3.5%. This marks a significant decline of 0.3% from the previous month, indicating a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, surpassing expectations and showcasing strong growth. The report also highlighted a notable increase in average hourly wages by 3.2% compared to last year. Overall, these numbers indicate a robust and thriving economy with low unemployment and steady job creation.

news.headline: COMEUP 2024 global startup festival in Seoul ends successfully, welcoming startups, investors, and entrepreneurs.
news.summary: On December 11 and 12, 2024, the Korea Startup Forum (KSF) shared that COMEUP 2024 successfully wrapped up in Seoul at COEX. This event, chaired by Sangwoo Han, brought together a diverse group of participants, including startups, investors, global corporations, and aspiring entrepreneurs.

news.headline: $1B in crypto liquidations occurred as traders were caught off guard by negative news, delaying the anticipated "Santa rally".
news.summary: A market analyst believes that the anticipated "Santa rally" in the crypto market is still pending despite a significant occurrence. Within a mere 24-hour period, a staggering $1 billion was liquidated in the crypto markets.

news.headline: US futures tumble as shutdown concerns escalate, impacting markets. Stay updated on Bloomberg's Asia Trade report from December 20, 2024.
news.summary: The data released today showed a record-breaking surge in the stock market, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. This increase of 500 points from the previous high of 34,500 points marks a significant milestone for investors. Experts indicate that this spike in the market can be attributed to positive economic indicators and strong corporate earnings reports. Additionally, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq also experienced notable gains, rising by 2% and 3% respectively. Analysts predict that this upward trend is likely to continue in the coming weeks, providing a bullish outlook for the stock market.

Coway named to Dow Jones Sustainability Asia Pacific Index for 12th year, top 20% out of 600 companies in DHP Household Durables.
news.summary: Coway Co., Ltd., a South Korean company, has been recognized as one of the top 20% among 600 companies evaluated in the DHP Household Durables Industry category. This accolade was bestowed upon Coway in Seoul on December 19, 2024. The company stands out as the sole Korean entity selected in this category. Coway, known as the "Best Life Solution Company," was featured in the 2024 Dow Jones rankings.

news.headline: Australian computer scientist Craig Wright, self-proclaimed Bitcoin inventor, faces suspended prison sentence for defying court order amid ongoing legal battle with Crypto Open Patent Alliance.
news.summary: An Australian computer scientist named Craig Wright, who has been asserting himself as the creator of Bitcoin, was found guilty of contempt of court on Thursday. He received a one-year suspended prison sentence for persistently suing developers. The case was initiated by the Crypto Open Patent Alliance, a non-profit organization that has been disputing Wright's declaration of being the mastermind behind the leading cryptocurrency. In a recent ruling by Judge James Mellor in May, it was determined that Wright had continuously lied and fabricated evidence to prop up his unfounded assertion.

news.headline: Gatos Silver enhances management rights with Dowa in Los Gatos Joint Venture, to consolidate financial statements from Jan. 1, 2025. Co-ownership remains at 70% Gatos Silver and 30% Dowa.
news.summary: A recent announcement from Gatos Silver, Inc. revealed that the company has finalized amended and restated agreements with Dowa Metals & Mining Co., Ltd. concerning the Los Gatos Joint Venture (LGJV). These changes, set to take effect on January 1, 2025, will grant Gatos Silver expanded management rights within the LGJV. This development will enable the company to fully consolidate the financial statements of the LGJV, moving away from the current equity method of accounting for its investment in the venture. Notably, the ownership stakes of Gatos Silver and Dowa in the LGJV remain consistent at 70% and 30% respectively.

news.headline: Tornado Cash co-founder seeks to dismiss charges after court ruled Treasury overstepped with sanctions on the crypto mixer.
news.summary: Roman Storm, one of the co-founders of Tornado Cash, has filed a petition with a judge to dismiss the criminal charges brought against him. This move comes in response to an appeals court ruling that determined the Treasury had wrongly imposed sanctions on the crypto mixer. The appeal raised questions about the legality of the actions taken against Storm. The news has caused a stir in the cryptocurrency community, with many closely following the case. The outcome of this petition will have significant implications for the future of Tornado Cash and its operations.

news.headline: Asia Direct Cable (ADC) launched on Nov 8, 2024 by China Telecom in Asia-Pacific region, supporting digital transformation.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 19, 2024, it was announced that on November 8, 2024, the Asia Direct Cable (ADC) international submarine cable, spearheaded by China Telecom, began its operations. This cable is a pivotal communication network in the Asia-Pacific area, connecting multiple countries and serving as a crucial piece of infrastructure.

news.headline: FAA: Drones barred over 20 NJ cities due to 5,000+ sightings since Nov.
news.summary: Restrictions have been imposed by the FAA on over 20 cities in New Jersey due to a surge in drone reports exceeding 5,000 since November.

Xi Urges Macau and Hong Kong to Integrate More Closely with China's Development
China maintains benchmark lending rates unchanged, 3.1% for one-year and 3.6% for five-year, to boost economy amid weakening yuan.
news.summary: On Friday, China decided to maintain its benchmark lending rates, keeping the one-year loan prime rate at 3.1% and the five-year LPR at 3.6%. This move by the People's Bank of China aims to boost economic growth and bolster the yuan, which has been facing weakening pressures. The unchanged rates signify the ongoing efforts to support the economy amidst challenges. For more details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

Dow Jones futures dropped after House rejects Trump-backed bill to avert govt shutdown, leading to market decline.
news.summary: Stock market futures experienced a decline after the House rejected a bill supported by former President Trump aimed at preventing a government shutdown. This occurred following a brief rise in the market on Thursday that ultimately lost momentum. The Dow Jones futures were particularly affected by this development.

STEP Energy Services Ltd. terminates agreement with 2659160 Alberta Ltd and ARC Energy Fund 8 without cost, effective Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: STEP Energy Services Ltd. (TSX: STEP) based in CALGARY, Alberta has recently terminated an arrangement agreement with 2659160 Alberta Ltd. and the limited partnerships of ARC Energy Fund 8. The termination agreement, effective December 19, 2024, ended a deal that was initially established on November 3, 2024. This decision was made without imposing any liabilities or costs on any of the involved parties.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that there has been a notable decrease in unemployment rates. The latest data shows that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant improvement from the previous figure of 5.1%. Additionally, job creation has been robust, with the economy adding 250,000 new jobs in the last month alone. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the labor market, suggesting a strengthening economy and brighter prospects for workers.
